response.justification: The candidate brings solid full-stack engineering depth and 17+ years of experience, but the resume does not support the Principal/Director-level AI strategy profile the role requires. AI involvement is limited to a single line in the most recent position (MCP tooling, agentic workflows since April 2025), with no demonstrated strategic AI leadership, advisory track record, cloud platform depth, or recognized AI expertise in the form of products, publications, or community standing. The experience arc is that of a strong individual contributor in web and systems engineering, not a principal-level AI strategist.
strengths: 17+ years of hands-on engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Founder and sustained open-source builder (GISCollective), showing entrepreneurial initiative
Public speaker and workshop creator, indicating some ability to teach and inspire technically
concerns: AI expertise is nascent and narrow — only the current role (started April 2025) mentions AI work, with no demonstrated depth or impact
No evidence of strategic advisory, customer engagement, or thought leadership at the Director/Principal level
Cloud expertise is shallow (AWS CDK mentioned once); no cloud platform architecture or product ownership at scale
